allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'ngrok finalizado'")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process node,ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'Tudo encerrado'")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name ngrok -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; echo 'Processos encerrados'")

Bash(node -e "const { createClient } = require\('@supabase/supabase-js'\); const supabase = createClient\('https://rtzchftojvxjiolxxqcr.supabase.co', 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InJ0emNoZnRvanZ4amlvbHh4cWNyIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ1ODM2MjcsImV4cCI6MjA5MDE1OTYyN30.O397F109jAFle6Gh1-kD_-KMt8JVHwLgHAFhbyn0hy8'\); \(async \(\) => { const { data: s } = await supabase.from\('sessions'\).delete\(\).neq\('phone', ''\); const { data: c } = await supabase.from\('cart_items'\).delete\(\).neq\('phone', ''\); const { data: o } = await supabase.from\('orders'\).delete\(\).neq\('phone', ''\); console.log\('Sessões:', s?.length || 0, '| Carrinho:', c?.length || 0, '| Pedidos:', o?.length || 0\); }\)\(\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['id'], p['name'][:40], bool\(p.get\('images'\)\)\) for p in d]")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Output 'node parado'")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; t=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('tunnels',[]\); [print\(x['public_url']\) for x in t if 'https' in x['public_url']]")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const t=JSON.parse\(d\).tunnels; t.forEach\(x=>{ if\(x.public_url.includes\('https'\)\) console.log\(x.public_url\); }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const t=JSON.parse\(d\).tunnels; t.forEach\(x=>{ if\(x.public_url.includes\('https'\)\) console.log\('🌐 Ngrok URL: ' + x.public_url\); }\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const t=JSON.parse\(d\).tunnels; t.forEach\(x=>{ if\(x.public_url.includes\('https'\)\) console.log\('🌐 Ngrok: ' + x.public_url\); }\); }\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host 'Node finalizado'")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name ngrok -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Ngrok antigo finalizado \(se havia\)'")
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process ngrok -ArgumentList 'http 3000' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host 'Ngrok iniciado em background'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process -FilePath 'C:\\Users\\renan\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm\\ngrok.cmd' -ArgumentList 'http 3000' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Get-Process ngrok -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ProcessName,Id")
